variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of goods sold appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold', and nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to selling, administrative, or R&D expenses appears in the operating section above financial lines. Because the selected XSGA bucket already consists of 'Selling costs', 'Administrative costs', and 'Research and development costs', and no separate same-level D&A line is disclosed, no separate XSGA D&A row should be added.
